title: The Foundation: Sanjeevni Genesis
description: Initialization of the Sanjeevni ecosystem with core decentralized infrastructure.

milestones.label: Project Kickoff
milestones.description: Scaffolded Next.js and Node.js backend with full ZK-Proof support.

milestones.label: Smart Contract Deployment
milestones.description: Successfully deployed Patient and Doctor management contracts with role-based access control.

milestones.label: IPFS Integration
milestones.description: Integrated decentralized storage for medical records with on-chain authorization logic.

milestones.label: Secure Document Viewer
milestones.description: Developed the watermarked, sandboxed medical record viewer for patient-doctor document exchange.

milestones.label: Doctor & Patient Portals
milestones.description: Launched initial dashboards with real-time patient-doctor chat and record management.

title: The Expansion: Ecosystem Scaling
description: Rapid scaling of features with advanced privacy, multi-role access, and clinical deployment.

milestones.label: ZK-Proof Integration
milestones.description: Implemented Circom-based zero-knowledge proofs for trustless insurance claims verification.

milestones.label: Hospital & Insurance Modules
milestones.description: Launched dedicated portals for Hospital administrators and Insurance providers.

milestones.label: Turso Data Migration
milestones.description: Migrated clinical data to Turso (LibSQL) for high-performance serverless edge stability.

milestones.label: ERP & Admin Systems
milestones.description: Finalized tiered ERP subscription system with real-time Google Sheets synchronization.

milestones.label: Clinical Deployment
milestones.description: Successfully deployed production-ready build to Netlify with full SEO and performance optimizations.

milestones.label: Development Timeline
milestones.description: Visualization of the 48-hour development blitz for transparency and progress tracking.
